headline: Oil prices fall to around $100 after Trump indicates war could end in weeks
summary: Crude prices fell Wednesday as President Donald Trump signaled a willingness to exit the Iran war even as the Strait of Hormuz remains largely closed.

headline: South Korea's Kospi leads rebound in Asia markets as Trump says Iran war could end in weeks

headline: S&P 500 Shows Some Surprise Winners After One Month Of War
summary: The war in Iran defined U.S. stock market behavior in March. While oil and natural gas names seized the bulk of the largest gains among S&P 500 stocks, two of the top-five advancers — Dow Inc. (DOW) and LyondellBasell (LYB) — were maybe less expected. Over the course of this month through Monday, Dow rose 36% and LyondellBasell gained 43%,...

headline: Warren Buffett’s Energy Picks Soared as Berkshire Hathaway Had 8 Straight Losing Sessions
